LONG_TERM_RECOVERY: Long-term recovery strategies should prioritize ecosystem restoration through gradual reforestation using native trees and supporting vegetation, promoting biodiversity recovery. Implementing community-based fire management plans and creating fire-resistant buffer zones will reduce future risk, while sustained monitoring and environmental education programs will ensure resilience against recurring fires and foster a healthy ecological balance.
